heading: List Workspace Defaults
body:
To view the `defaultTierSize` and `maxTierSize` of a stream processing workspace
using [mongosh](mongodb-shell), use the [sp.listWorkspaceDefaults()](manual/reference/method/sp.listWorkspaceDefaults) method.

```sh
sp.listWorkspaceDefaults()
```

This method returns:

- `defaultTierSize`

- `maxTierSize`
